title: Microsoft Build 2026
full_text:
Microsoft Build 2026
Get all the news from the keynote on Microsoft Build Live
Official Microsoft Blog | Microsoft Build 2026: Be yourself at work
More about our featured news
Developers
AI alone won’t change your business. The system running it will.
Windows
Furthering Windows as the trusted platform for development
Microsoft AI
Building a hill-climbing machine: Launching seven new MAI Models
Quantum
Introducing Microsoft’s Majorana 2
Watch the keynote
Watch the full keynote
Keynote in 2 minutes
More news and information
New Azure Cobalt 200 VMs deliver 50% performance improvement, fully optimized for modern agentic AI workloads
Announcing preview of Azure Cobalt 200 Arm-based Virtual Machines
Announcing preview of new Azure Lasv5 and Laosv5 VMs based on the AMD EPYC ‘Turin’ processor
Unlocking the possibilities of physical AI with Foundry Local and Azure Local
Announcing Anyscale on Azure public preview: Powered by Ray on AKS
Announcing Confidential Live Migration in Azure
Preview of the analytics feature for Azure Confidential Clean Rooms
What’s new in Azure App Service at #MSBuild 2026
Announcing Confidential Live Migration with Intel TDX in Azure
Simpler, scalable file share management in Azure – now generally available
Azure Functions at Build 2026 update
Closing the gap between AI ambition and AI-readiness with agentic modernization
Windows 365 extends support for developers
Windows platform security for AI agents
Building the next generation of devices for developers: Surface RTX Spark Dev Box
Composing a new platform for agent-first devices
Azure Backup support for Cosmos DB in public preview
Introducing Azure Container Apps Sandboxes: Secure infrastructure for agentic workloads
Announcing Azure Infrastructure Resiliency Manager Public Preview
What’s new in AKS at Microsoft Build 2026
Build, deploy and govern sovereign AI with Foundry Local on Azure Local.
Azure API Management at Build 2026 update
Agentic retrieval and memory toolkits now available for Azure Cosmos DB
Microsoft Build 2026: Building agentic apps with Microsoft Fabric and Microsoft Databases
Azure Logic Apps at Build 2026 update
Introducing Azure Container Linux
Announcing Azure Linux 4.0: Purpose-built for Azure, now in public preview
GPU Accelerated fabric data warehouse
Azure HorizonDB: Enterprise-ready Postgres, engineered for the AI era
Semantic reranking in Azure Cosmos DB now in public preview
Announcing Microsoft Web IQ
Foundry IQ: Build smarter agents faster with unified knowledge and serverless retrieval
Foundry IQ: Enterprise AI security updates
Foundry IQ: new governance and enterprise AI security capabilities
Foundry IQ: Data pipeline updates and smarter content extraction
Foundry IQ: Outperforming agentic RAG benchmarks with up to 20% better answers
Work IQ: Production‑ready intelligence for every agent
Announcing the new Work IQ APIs
Grounding at scale: Engineering the retrieval system for the agentic web
What’s new in Azure Container Apps at Build 2026
Microsoft Foundry updates help deploy and run AI agents effectively
A developer’s guide to model lifecycle management in Microsoft Foundry
Build and run agents at scale with Microsoft Foundry at Build 2026
What’s new in Microsoft Foundry | Build 2026
The new GitHub app for agentic development
GHCP modernization​ GA
Rayfin delivers enterprise-grade app backends
Security Build recap: agentic SLDC and A365
Build 2026: From observability to ROI for AI agents on any framework
Introducing Agent Control Specification: Portable runtime governance for AI Agents
Turn specs into evals for any agent with ASSERT
Build agents you can trust: A new open trust stack for AI agents on any framework
Build 2026: Securing code, agents and models across the development lifecycle
Announcing new security, maintenance and analytics features for PostgreSQL at Microsoft Build 2026
Secure, modern access to Azure Files on macOS with Microsoft Entra ID
Build collaborative agents where work happens
Introducing Microsoft Scout: Your always-on personal agent
Frontier Tuning: Teaching AI to work the way you do
Mayo Clinic and Microsoft collaborate to develop a frontier AI model for healthcare
Announcing Microsoft Discovery general availability and Microsoft Discovery app preview
Explore Microsoft Discovery
Majorana 2 — Microsoft’s scalable quantum processor with reliable, long-lasting qubits
In arXiv: 20 second parity lifetime in an InAs-Pb device
Microsoft for Startups introduces a clearer path from AI development to enterprise growth
Build, scale and monetize apps and agents with Microsoft Marketplace
Five ways we’re confusing AI capability and AI reality — and how to bridge the gap
Microsoft Build 2026: Empowering our developers to adopt agentic AI at Microsoft
Videos from the keynote
Opening video
Introducing Majorana 2
Mustafa Suleyman unveils 7 AI models
Satya Nadella and Jensen Huang
Satya Nadella and Cristiano Amon
Project Solara: A new vision for agent-first computing
Introducing Surface RTX Spark Dev Box
Introducing Autopilots
Demo videos
Developer experience on Windows
OpenClaw + Windows
GitHub App + Rayfin
Microsoft IQ
Microsoft Foundry + Agent 365
Microsoft Discovery
MDASH
Frontier Tuning
